prompt: Keep the VVRP cursor blinking after command input
note: Prompt Toolkit stops cursor blinking during redraw; CMD now reapplies BLINKING_UNDERLINE after every show_cursor call so typing no longer leaves a static cursor. 280 tests pass.
decisions: Restore the terminal cursor shape in the Prompt Toolkit output redraw path
